requirement: Buyer can create a sourcing event for RFIs, RFQs, RFPs, and Auctions.
Supplier can participate in sourcing events via email and the Coupa Supplier Portal.
Sourcing events can be configured with timelines, evaluations, scoring, and award decisions.
Approval workflows are aligned with Limits of Authority (DOA / LOA).
Savings tracking is enabled for planned, negotiated, and cost avoidance savings.
System settings and administrative configurations are relevant to sourcing activities.
Category Managers/Procurement team can initiate and manage strategic sourcing activities for centre-managed commodities and services.
Buyers can create purchase requests that can be 'flipped' into sourcing events to streamline supplier engagement and ensure competitive pricing.
Users can conduct RFx (RFI, RFP, RFQ) and auctions (English reverse auction, Dutch reverse auction, Japanese reverse auction) events in Coupa.
Users can leverage three distinct types of reverse auctions in Coupa, each designed to align with specific sourcing objectives and supplier engagement models.
Users can define and track savings in Coupa.
Coupa Admins can customize sourcing settings and configurations to enable certain controls at the Procurement Admin (Buyer) side.
